subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested Himself through wisdom, and revealed His Cause through wisdom, and commanded all through wisdom, and ordained [3.5s]... ...Nothing hath ever happened nor will happen without a cause or effect. Reflect a while and consider
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ظهر بالحکمه و اظهر امره بالحکمه و امر الکل بالحکمه و جعل
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @contention and conflict, @the power of words; of speech, @martyrs and martyrdom, @nationalism; love of country, @call to action
